title: Identity/IAM AD User Lifecycle
summary: Submit evidence for creating, modifying, disabling, and documenting a training Active Directory user account.
required_evidence: Training user identity and request summary
Validation evidence from ADUC or PowerShell
mentor_prompts: Confirm the request scope before changing the account.
Verify OU placement before group assignment.
Explain why each group is needed.
Do not include passwords or secrets.
Write the final note like a help desk/IAM ticket update.
safety_notes: Do not submit sensitive personal information.
